metadata.title: Project Ghost v0.2.5 -- Epistemic Safety Contracts as a Property Class for Autonomous Agents (Replication Package)
metadata.description: Replication package for the paper 'Epistemic Safety Contracts as a Property Class for Autonomous Agents'. Includes the seven verifier implementations (BAUD-v1, ERUR-v1/v2, MD-v1, RLB-v1, FPB-v1/v2), the mechanical proofs in Lean 4 (partition theorem with no `sorry`; RLB-v1 unbounded reduced to a single load-bearing lemma) and TLA+/TLC (parametric sweep at W in {4, 8, 16}), the Python<->TLA+ bridge conformance test (ADR-0043), the 3-ULog discrimination experiment outputs (matrix.json) on real PX4 SITL flight telemetry, and the three top-level reproducibility documents (INSTALL.md, REPRODUCE.md, AUDIT.md). The full pipeline is re-runnable from a fresh clone in ~10 minutes on a modern laptop; see INSTALL.md for toolchain pins (Python 3.11+, Java 17, Lean 4 4.31.0 stable, tla2tools.jar v1.8.0).
